decisionPoints.description: File storage solution for product images

tasks.description: Provision PostgreSQL database, Redis cache, and necessary storage for the e-commerce platform
tasks.details:
1. Create PostgreSQL cluster for main database:
```yaml
apiVersion: postgresql.cnpg.io/v1
kind: Cluster
metadata:
  name: ecommerce-postgres
spec:
  instances: 3
  postgresql:
    parameters:
      max_connections: "200"
      shared_buffers: "256MB"
```

2. Deploy Redis for session storage and caching:
```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: redis
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
```

3. Create persistent volumes for file uploads (product images)
4. Set up ConfigMaps and Secrets for database connections
5. Configure ingress controllers for load balancing

subtasks.description: Configure and deploy PostgreSQL cluster with high availability setup using CloudNativePG operator for the e-commerce platform's main database
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive PostgreSQL cluster YAML manifest with 3 instances for high availability. Configure connection pooling with max_connections=200, shared_buffers=256MB, and other performance optimizations. Include backup configuration, monitoring endpoints, and resource limits. Set up primary/replica architecture with automatic failover capabilities.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate cluster deployment, test failover scenarios, verify connection limits and performance parameters
subtasks.title: Create PostgreSQL Cluster Configuration

subtasks.description: Set up Redis deployment for session management and application caching with persistence and high availability configuration
subtasks.details: Create Redis deployment YAML with persistent storage, configure Redis for both session storage and application caching. Include Redis configuration for memory management, persistence settings (RDB + AOF), and connection pooling. Set up Redis service for internal cluster communication and configure appropriate resource limits and health checks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test Redis connectivity, validate session persistence, verify cache operations and memory usage
subtasks.title: Deploy Redis Cache and Session Store

subtasks.description: Create persistent volumes and storage classes for file uploads, product images, and database storage with appropriate access modes and retention policies
subtasks.details: Define StorageClass configurations for different storage needs (SSD for database, standard for file uploads). Create PersistentVolumeClaims for product images, user uploads, and backup storage. Configure appropriate access modes (ReadWriteOnce, ReadOnlyMany), retention policies, and backup strategies. Include storage monitoring and capacity planning.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate storage provisioning, test file upload/download operations, verify backup and restore procedures
subtasks.title: Provision Storage Infrastructure

subtasks.description: Set up ConfigMaps, Secrets, NetworkPolicies, and ingress controllers for secure communication and load balancing across the e-commerce infrastructure
subtasks.details: Create Secrets for database credentials, Redis authentication, and TLS certificates. Configure ConfigMaps for application settings and database connection parameters. Set up NetworkPolicies for micro-segmentation, configure ingress controllers with SSL termination, rate limiting, and load balancing. Implement RBAC policies and service mesh configuration if applicable.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test network policies, validate secret rotation, verify ingress routing and SSL termination, perform security scanning
subtasks.title: Configure Security and Networking

subtasks.description: Review all Kubernetes manifests, configurations, and infrastructure code for best practices, security compliance, and performance optimization
subtasks.details: Conduct comprehensive review of all YAML manifests for security best practices, resource optimization, and Kubernetes standards compliance. Verify proper labeling, annotations, and resource quotas. Review backup strategies, disaster recovery procedures, and monitoring configurations. Ensure adherence to infrastructure as code principles and documentation standards.
subtasks.testStrategy: Code quality checks, security scanning, performance benchmarking, compliance validation
subtasks.title: Infrastructure Code Review and Optimization

subtasks.description: Perform comprehensive testing of the entire e-commerce infrastructure setup including database connectivity, cache operations, storage access, and network communication
subtasks.details: Execute end-to-end testing of the infrastructure stack including PostgreSQL cluster connectivity and failover testing, Redis cache performance and persistence validation, storage read/write operations, network policy enforcement, and ingress routing. Perform load testing, disaster recovery simulations, and security penetration testing. Document test results and create operational runbooks.
subtasks.testStrategy: End-to-end integration tests, load testing, failover testing, security validation, performance benchmarking
subtasks.title: Integration Testing and Validation

tasks.testStrategy: Verify all resources are running: kubectl get pods,svc,pvc. Test database connectivity with psql. Verify Redis with redis-cli ping.
tasks.title: Setup E-Commerce Infrastructure (Bolt - Kubernetes)

tasks.description: Build the core backend API with authentication, product management, cart, orders, and admin functionality using Node.js/Elysia
tasks.details:
1. Initialize Elysia project with TypeScript:
```bash
bun create elysia ecommerce-api
cd ecommerce-api
bun add @elysiajs/bearer @elysiajs/cors @elysiajs/swagger
```

2. Setup Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL:
```typescript
// drizzle.config.ts
export default {
  schema: './src/db/schema.ts',
  out: './drizzle',
  driver: 'pg',
  dbCredentials: { connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }
}
```

3. Create database schemas for users, products, categories, orders, cart, reviews
4. Implement Better Auth for authentication with email/password and OAuth
5. Build REST API endpoints:
   - /auth/* (login, register, oauth)
   - /products/* (CRUD, search, filter)
   - /categories/* (CRUD)
   - /cart/* (add, remove, update)
   - /orders/* (create, history, tracking)
   - /admin/* (product/order/user management)
6. Integrate Stripe for payment processing
7. Setup Resend for email notifications
8. Implement real-time stock updates with WebSockets

subtasks.description: Set up the foundational Elysia project with TypeScript, configure Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL, and create comprehensive database schemas for all entities (users, products, categories, orders, cart, reviews).
subtasks.details: Create new Elysia project using 'bun create elysia ecommerce-api', install required dependencies (@elysiajs/bearer, @elysiajs/cors, @elysiajs/swagger), configure Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL connection, design and implement database schemas for users (id, email, password, role, created_at), products (id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, images), categories (id, name, description), orders (id, user_id, total, status, created_at), cart_items (id, user_id, product_id, quantity), and reviews (id, product_id, user_id, rating, comment). Include proper relationships, indexes, and constraints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for schema validation and database connection
subtasks.title: Initialize Elysia Project and Setup Database Schema

subtasks.description: Build comprehensive authentication system using Better Auth with email/password and OAuth support, including JWT token management and user session handling.
subtasks.details: Configure Better Auth for email/password authentication and OAuth providers (Google, GitHub), implement JWT token generation and validation, create middleware for protected routes, build authentication endpoints (/auth/login, /auth/register, /auth/logout, /auth/refresh, /auth/oauth/*), handle password hashing with bcrypt, implement email verification flow, create user role-based access control (customer, admin), and add proper error handling for authentication failures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for auth flows and JWT validation
subtasks.title: Implement Authentication System with Better Auth

subtasks.description: Create comprehensive product management endpoints with CRUD operations, search functionality, filtering, and category management.
subtasks.details: Implement product CRUD endpoints (/products GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), add advanced search with query parameters (name, category, price range), implement product filtering and sorting (by price, rating, popularity), create category management endpoints (/categories/*), add product image upload handling, implement inventory management with stock tracking, create product review endpoints (/products/:id/reviews), add validation for product data (price, stock, descriptions), and implement pagination for product listings.
subtasks.testStrategy: API endpoint testing and product data validation tests
subtasks.title: Build Product Management API Module

subtasks.description: Build cart operations and comprehensive order processing system with order history and tracking capabilities.
subtasks.details: Create cart management endpoints (/cart/* - add, remove, update, clear), implement cart persistence for authenticated users, build order creation endpoint with cart validation, create order history endpoints (/orders/history), implement order status tracking (pending, processing, shipped, delivered), add order details retrieval (/orders/:id), implement inventory validation during order creation, create order cancellation functionality, and add proper error handling for out-of-stock scenarios.
subtasks.testStrategy: Cart operations testing and order flow validation
subtasks.title: Implement Shopping Cart and Order Management

subtasks.description: Implement secure payment processing using Stripe API with webhook handling for payment confirmations and refunds.
subtasks.details: Configure Stripe SDK, create payment intent endpoints (/payments/create-intent), implement secure payment processing with proper error handling, set up Stripe webhooks for payment confirmation (/webhooks/stripe), handle payment success/failure scenarios, implement refund functionality for orders, add payment method storage for customers, create payment history tracking, implement subscription billing if needed, and ensure PCI compliance with secure payment data handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Payment flow testing with Stripe test mode
subtasks.title: Integrate Stripe Payment Processing

subtasks.description: Implement email notification system using Resend for order confirmations, shipping updates, and user communications.
subtasks.details: Configure Resend API for email delivery, create email templates for order confirmation, shipping notifications, password reset, and account verification, implement email queue system for reliable delivery, add email notification triggers for order status changes, create welcome email for new users, implement email preferences management, add email analytics and delivery tracking, and ensure proper error handling for email failures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Email delivery testing and template validation
subtasks.title: Setup Email Notifications with Resend

subtasks.description: Build comprehensive admin endpoints for managing products, orders, and users, plus implement WebSocket support for real-time stock updates and notifications.
subtasks.details: Create admin-only endpoints (/admin/products, /admin/orders, /admin/users) with proper role-based access control, implement admin analytics dashboard data endpoints, add user management functionality (ban/unban, role changes), create order management tools (status updates, shipping tracking), implement WebSocket server for real-time stock updates, add real-time notifications for low stock alerts, create live order tracking for customers, and implement admin notification system for new orders and critical events.
subtasks.testStrategy: Admin endpoint authorization tests and WebSocket connection testing
subtasks.title: Implement Admin Dashboard API and Real-time Features

subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive code review of all implemented modules, generate API documentation, and perform integration testing across all endpoints.
subtasks.details: Review all implemented code for best practices, security vulnerabilities, and performance optimizations, generate comprehensive API documentation using Swagger/OpenAPI, create integration tests for all API endpoints, implement error handling consistency across modules, add request/response validation schemas, create API rate limiting and security headers, test authentication flows end-to-end, validate payment processing security, test email delivery reliability, and ensure WebSocket functionality works correctly across different scenarios.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full integration test suite and security audit
subtasks.title: Code Review, Documentation, and API Testing

tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for all API endpoints. Integration tests with test database. Load testing for product search. Verify Stripe webhook handling.
tasks.title: E-Commerce Backend API (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

tasks.description: Build the customer-facing web application with product browsing, cart, checkout, and user account management using Next.js 15
tasks.details:
1. Initialize Next.js 15 project:
```bash
npx create-next-app@latest ecommerce-web --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app
cd ecommerce-web
npm install @shadcn/ui lucide-react @stripe/stripe-js
```

2. Setup shadcn/ui components:
```bash
npx shadcn-ui@latest init
npx shadcn-ui@latest add button card input form dialog
```

3. Implement key pages and components:
   - Home page with featured products
   - Product listing with search/filter
   - Product detail pages
   - Shopping cart and checkout flow
   - User authentication (login/register)
   - User profile and order history
   - Wishlist functionality

4. Setup Better Auth client integration
5. Implement Stripe checkout integration
6. Add responsive design with Tailwind CSS
7. Setup SEO optimization with Next.js metadata API
8. Implement real-time stock updates with WebSocket client
9. Add multi-currency support with internationalization

subtasks.description: Create the Next.js 15 project foundation with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and install core dependencies including shadcn/ui, Lucide React icons, and Stripe integration packages.
subtasks.details: Run 'npx create-next-app@latest ecommerce-web --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app' to initialize the project. Install additional dependencies: @shadcn/ui, lucide-react, @stripe/stripe-js. Setup shadcn/ui with 'npx shadcn-ui@latest init' and add core components (button, card, input, form, dialog). Configure project structure and basic TypeScript configurations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify project builds successfully and all dependencies are properly installed
subtasks.title: Initialize Next.js 15 Project and Setup Core Dependencies

subtasks.description: Build login, register, and user profile components with Better Auth client integration for secure user authentication and session management.
subtasks.details: Create authentication components including login form, registration form, password reset, and user profile pages. Integrate Better Auth client SDK for authentication flows. Implement protected route components and authentication context providers. Setup user session management and token handling.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for authentication components and integration tests for auth flows
subtasks.title: Implement Authentication UI Components and Better Auth Integration

subtasks.description: Develop product listing pages, search and filtering capabilities, product detail views, and category navigation with responsive design.
subtasks.details: Create product listing components with pagination, search bar, filter controls (price, category, brand), and sorting options. Implement product detail pages with image galleries, specifications, reviews, and related products. Build category navigation and breadcrumb components. Add debounced search and real-time filtering functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Component tests for search functionality and visual regression tests for product displays
subtasks.title: Build Product Catalog and Search Functionality

subtasks.description: Create shopping cart management, Stripe checkout integration, order summary, and payment processing components with real-time updates.
subtasks.details: Build shopping cart components with add/remove items, quantity updates, and persistent storage. Implement Stripe Elements integration for secure payment processing. Create checkout flow with shipping information, payment methods, order summary, and confirmation pages. Add cart state management and real-time synchronization.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for cart operations and Stripe payment flow testing in sandbox mode
subtasks.title: Develop Shopping Cart and Checkout Flow

subtasks.description: Build user profile management, order history, wishlist functionality, and account settings with responsive design.
subtasks.details: Create user dashboard with profile editing, order history display, order tracking, and account settings. Implement wishlist functionality with add/remove products and wishlist sharing. Build responsive layouts for mobile and desktop views. Add user preferences management and notification settings.
subtasks.testStrategy: User journey tests for dashboard functionality and responsive design testing
subtasks.title: Implement User Dashboard and Order Management

subtasks.description: Implement Next.js metadata API for SEO, multi-currency support with internationalization, and WebSocket client for real-time stock updates.
subtasks.details: Configure Next.js metadata API for dynamic SEO tags, Open Graph, and structured data. Implement internationalization (i18n) with multi-currency support and locale-based formatting. Setup WebSocket client for real-time stock updates, price changes, and inventory notifications. Add performance optimizations and code splitting.
subtasks.testStrategy: SEO audit tools, currency conversion testing, and real-time update verification
subtasks.title: Setup SEO, Internationalization, and Real-time Features

subtasks.description: Comprehensive code review focusing on React/Next.js best practices, performance optimization, security, accessibility, and overall architecture quality.
subtasks.details: Review component architecture for reusability and maintainability. Verify Next.js 15 feature utilization (App Router, Server Components, streaming). Check TypeScript type safety and error handling. Validate responsive design implementation. Review security practices for authentication and payment flows. Ensure accessibility compliance (WCAG) and performance optimization (Core Web Vitals).
subtasks.testStrategy: Automated code quality tools, performance audits, and accessibility testing
subtasks.title: Code Review and Quality Assurance

tasks.testStrategy: Component testing with React Testing Library. E2E tests with Playwright for checkout flow. Lighthouse audits for performance. Cross-browser testing.
tasks.title: E-Commerce Frontend Web App (Blaze - React/Next.js)

tasks.description: Build the administrative dashboard for product, order, and user management with analytics and reporting
tasks.details:
1. Create separate Next.js app for admin dashboard:
```bash
npx create-next-app@latest ecommerce-admin --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app
cd ecommerce-admin
npm install @shadcn/ui @tanstack/react-table recharts date-fns
```

2. Setup admin-specific shadcn/ui components:
```bash
npx shadcn-ui@latest add table data-table badge select textarea
```

3. Implement admin pages:
   - Dashboard overview with key metrics
   - Product management (CRUD, inventory)
   - Order management (status updates, fulfillment)
   - User management (view, suspend, roles)
   - Analytics and reporting with charts
   - Discount code management
   - Inventory management with low stock alerts

4. Setup role-based access control
5. Implement data tables with sorting, filtering, pagination
6. Add export functionality for reports
7. Create real-time notifications for new orders
8. Implement bulk operations for products and orders

subtasks.description: Create the Next.js application foundation with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and essential dependencies for the admin dashboard
subtasks.details: Initialize Next.js app with create-next-app using TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Install required dependencies including @shadcn/ui, @tanstack/react-table, recharts, and date-fns. Setup shadcn/ui components (table, data-table, badge, select, textarea). Configure project structure with admin-specific layouts and routing foundation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify successful installation and basic app startup
subtasks.title: Setup Next.js Admin Dashboard Foundation

subtasks.description: Build the main dashboard page with key metrics, charts, and analytics visualization components
subtasks.details: Create dashboard overview page with key business metrics (total orders, revenue, users, products). Implement interactive charts using recharts for sales trends, order status distribution, and user growth. Add date range selectors and metric cards with percentage changes. Include responsive layout for mobile/desktop views.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for chart components and metric calculations
subtasks.title: Implement Dashboard Overview and Analytics Interface

subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive product CRUD operations and order management interface with data tables
subtasks.details: Create product management pages with CRUD operations, inventory tracking, and bulk operations. Implement order management interface with status updates, fulfillment tracking, and order details view. Build data tables using @tanstack/react-table with sorting, filtering, and pagination. Add search functionality and export capabilities for both products and orders.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for CRUD operations and data table functionality
subtasks.title: Build Product and Order Management Systems

subtasks.description: Create user management interface with role-based access control and security features
subtasks.details: Implement user management pages with view, suspend, and role assignment capabilities. Build role-based access control system with permission management. Add user activity logs and account status management. Create admin user authentication flow with secure session handling and permission validation middleware.
subtasks.testStrategy: Security testing for access control and user management features
subtasks.title: Develop User Administration and Security Features

subtasks.description: Comprehensive review of admin dashboard implementation for code quality, security, and best practices
subtasks.details: Review all implemented components for code quality, security vulnerabilities, and React/Next.js best practices. Verify proper TypeScript usage, component structure, and performance optimizations. Validate role-based access control implementation and data handling security. Check responsive design implementation and accessibility compliance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Code quality analysis and security audit
subtasks.title: Code Review and Quality Assurance

tasks.testStrategy: Admin workflow testing. Role permission verification. Data export validation. Real-time notification testing. Performance testing with large datasets.
tasks.title: Admin Dashboard Web App (Blaze - React/Next.js)

tasks.description: Build the mobile application for iOS and Android with core shopping functionality and push notifications
tasks.details:
1. Initialize Expo project:
```bash
npx create-expo-app@latest ecommerce-mobile --template
cd ecommerce-mobile
npx expo install @react-navigation/native @react-navigation/bottom-tabs
```

2. Setup navigation and core screens:
```typescript
// app.json
{
  "expo": {
    "name": "E-Commerce App",
    "slug": "ecommerce-mobile",
    "platforms": ["ios", "android"],
    "plugins": ["expo-notifications", "expo-secure-store"]
  }
}
```

3. Implement key mobile screens:
   - Product browsing with infinite scroll
   - Product search with voice input
   - Shopping cart with swipe actions
   - Streamlined checkout flow
   - User authentication with biometric support
   - Push notifications for order updates
   - Barcode scanning for product lookup

4. Setup secure storage for auth tokens
5. Implement offline cart functionality
6. Add camera integration for product search
7. Setup push notifications with Expo Notifications
8. Optimize for mobile performance and battery usage

subtasks.description: Set up the foundational Expo project structure with React Navigation and core routing configuration for the mobile e-commerce app
subtasks.details: Create Expo project using create-expo-app template, install React Navigation dependencies (@react-navigation/native, @react-navigation/bottom-tabs), configure app.json with platform settings and required plugins (expo-notifications, expo-secure-store), set up basic navigation structure with bottom tabs for main app sections (Home, Search, Cart, Profile)
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify project builds successfully on both iOS and Android simulators, test navigation flows between screens
subtasks.title: Initialize Expo Project and Core Navigation

subtasks.description: Build the product browsing screens with infinite scroll, search functionality with voice input, and barcode scanning capabilities
subtasks.details: Create ProductList component with FlatList and infinite scroll pagination, implement search screen with text and voice input using expo-speech, integrate expo-barcode-scanner for product lookup, add product detail screen with image gallery and specifications, implement category filtering and sorting options
subtasks.testStrategy: Test infinite scroll performance, verify voice search accuracy, validate barcode scanning functionality
subtasks.title: Implement Product Browsing and Search Features

subtasks.description: Develop mobile-optimized shopping cart with swipe actions and streamlined checkout flow with offline functionality
subtasks.details: Create cart screen with swipe-to-delete actions using react-native-gesture-handler, implement quantity adjustment controls, build streamlined checkout flow with payment integration, add offline cart persistence using AsyncStorage, implement cart state management with Redux or Context API
subtasks.testStrategy: Test cart operations in offline mode, verify checkout flow completion, validate payment processing
subtasks.title: Build Shopping Cart and Checkout Experience

subtasks.description: Set up user authentication system with secure storage and biometric authentication capabilities
subtasks.details: Implement login/register screens with form validation, integrate expo-local-authentication for biometric login (Face ID/Touch ID/Fingerprint), set up secure token storage using expo-secure-store, implement auto-login functionality, add logout and account management features, handle authentication state persistence
subtasks.testStrategy: Test biometric authentication on physical devices, verify secure storage functionality, validate authentication flows
subtasks.title: Implement Authentication with Biometric Support

subtasks.description: Configure push notification system for order updates and implement camera features for product search
subtasks.details: Setup expo-notifications for push notification handling, implement notification permissions and registration, create notification service for order updates and promotional messages, integrate expo-camera for product image search and AR features, implement image processing for visual product search, add notification scheduling and local notifications
subtasks.testStrategy: Test push notifications on physical devices, verify camera functionality and permissions, validate image processing accuracy
subtasks.title: Setup Push Notifications and Camera Integration

subtasks.description: Review implementation for mobile performance, battery optimization, and cross-platform compatibility, then conduct comprehensive code review
subtasks.details: Optimize app performance for mobile devices including image loading, memory management, and battery usage, implement lazy loading for screens and components, add performance monitoring with react-native-flipper, review code for React Native best practices, ensure cross-platform compatibility between iOS and Android, validate app store requirements compliance, optimize bundle size and startup time
subtasks.testStrategy: Run performance profiling on physical devices, test battery usage during extended use, validate cross-platform functionality
subtasks.title: Performance Optimization and Code Review

tasks.testStrategy: Device testing on iOS and Android. Offline functionality testing. Push notification delivery testing. Performance profiling. App store compliance verification.
tasks.title: Mobile E-Commerce App (Tap - Expo)
